attrs.description: The image shows a highly distinctive oval-shaped compound situated within a flat agricultural landscape. The central compound is defined by an outer oval ring road enclosing a series of scalloped, loop-like, or petal-shaped hardstands and driving bays that radiate outward from a central north-south axis road. Within these radial bays, several small unidentified objects or vehicles are parked on the paved surfaces. To the west of the oval compound lies a support or administrative area containing several rectangular buildings, courtyards, and cleared spaces. Additional rectangular buildings and tree-lined parking areas are located directly south of the oval compound. The entire facility is surrounded by a dense patchwork of rectangular agricultural fields and dirt access roads.

observed_features.note: Outer boundary of the central compound
Scalloped, loop-like paved bays radiating from a central spine
Support and administrative buildings to the west and south
Agricultural access roads surrounding the area

attrs.site_signature_geometry: The image shows a highly distinctive oval-shaped compound situated within a flat agricultural landscape. The central compound is defined by an outer oval ring road enclosing a series of scalloped, loop-like, or petal-shaped hardstands and driving bays that radiate outward from a central north-south axis road. Within these radial bays, several small unidentified objects or vehicles are parked on the paved surfaces. To the west of the oval compound lies a support or administrative area containing several rectangular buildings, courtyards, and cleared spaces. Additional rectangular buildings and tree-lined parking areas are located directly south of the oval compound. The entire facility is surrounded by a dense patchwork of rectangular agricultural fields and dirt access roads.

attrs.description: A ground-level photograph taken at night on a wet urban street. A column of dark-colored, multi-wheeled armored vehicles is driving down the road with their headlights illuminated, casting bright reflections on the wet asphalt. On the right, several individuals in dark jackets and hoods are standing on the sidewalk, holding up smartphones to record or photograph the passing convoy. Overhead utility wires and streetlights are visible, and a date/time stamp 'OCT 26, 23:47' is printed in the lower right corner.

observed_features.note: Dark tactical vehicles with roof-mounted hatches/turret structures and illuminated headlights driving in sequence.
Wet asphalt street reflecting streetlights and vehicle headlights.
Paved sidewalk alongside the wet street.
Bystanders in winter clothing holding up smartphones.

attrs.site_signature_geometry: A ground-level photograph taken at night on a wet urban street. Overhead utility wires and streetlights are visible, and a date/time stamp 'OCT 26, 23:47' is printed in the lower right corner.

attrs.description: This high-altitude satellite view shows an expansive, highly dense urban area characterized by closely packed grey and light-colored structures with a complex street network. On the mid-left side, a paved runway, taxiway, and airfield infrastructure are clearly visible amidst open dirt ground. To the northeast (top right), there is a large, organized rectangular grid layout consisting of multiple parallel rows of plots or small structures. The southeast (bottom right) portion features green agricultural fields of irregular and rectangular shapes interspersed with smaller settlements. Major roads and possible railway lines segment the urban density.

observed_features.note: Paved runway and taxiway system visible on the left side of the frame.
Extremely dense, greyish residential/commercial urban matrix.
A large organized grid of rows and plots in the upper right quadrant.
Green agricultural patches in the lower-right area.

attrs.site_signature_geometry: This high-altitude satellite view shows an expansive, highly dense urban area characterized by closely packed grey and light-colored structures with a complex street network. count.unit: heavy multi-wheeled military vehicles with cylindrical canisters

attrs.description: The image shows a ground-level view of a parade on a city street. Three large, multi-wheeled green military transport vehicles are visible, each carrying a cluster of four large cylindrical canisters on their rear beds. The vehicle in the center is fully visible, showing a multi-axle chassis and a front driver's cab. In the background, a large crowd of spectators is gathered behind barriers, holding small flags. Several people in the foreground are holding up smartphones to capture photos or videos. Marching personnel in uniform are walking alongside the vehicles. Flags and lampposts line the street in the background under an overcast sky.

observed_features.note: Large transport vehicles with multiple axles and green camouflage paint.
Large tubes mounted horizontally/semi-obliquely on the rear of the vehicles.
People lining the parade route, some holding up smartphones.

attrs.caption_vs_image_consistency: The image is a ground-level photograph rather than overhead satellite/aerial imagery.

count.unit: heavy multi-axle vehicles with cylindrical canisters

attrs.description: A ground-level photograph showing several large green multi-axle military-style transport vehicles driving along a wide paved road. Each vehicle is configured with a rear-mounted assembly containing four large cylindrical canisters or tubes arranged horizontally in a group. The road is lined with spectators behind barriers, holding small flags and mobile devices. Several uniformed individuals are marching alongside the vehicles. Tall flagpoles displaying large flags are visible in the background and foreground.

observed_features.feature: large multi-axle vehicles with cylindrical canisters
observed_features.note: Each vehicle features a green camo pattern and carries four horizontal cylinders.
observed_features.shape: rectangular cab with cylindrical rear loads

observed_features.note: Spectators are viewing the procession, holding small flags and mobile phones.

attrs.description: A ground-level photograph capturing a military parade along a wide, paved city street. Multiple green, multi-axle heavy transport trucks are driving in a column, with each vehicle carrying four large cylindrical canisters arranged horizontally in two tiers. In the foreground, a dense crowd of onlookers is shown from behind, many holding up smartphones to capture photos and videos of the event. Several soldiers in ceremonial uniforms are marching alongside or near the vehicles. The street is decorated with various flags on lamp posts and poles, and additional spectators are seated in stands in the background.

observed_features.note: Heavy trucks carrying large horizontal cylindrical canisters on their rear beds
observed_features.shape: rectangular chassis with multiple large wheels

observed_features.note: City street serving as a parade route
Spectators lining the street and sitting in stands in the background

attrs.site_signature_geometry: A ground-level photograph capturing a military parade along a wide, paved city street. Multiple green, multi-axle heavy transport trucks are driving in a column, with each vehicle carrying four large cylindrical canisters arranged horizontally in two tiers. In the foreground, a dense crowd of onlookers is shown from behind, many holding up smartphones to capture photos and videos of the event. Several soldiers in ceremonial uniforms are marching alongside or near the vehicles. The street is decorated with various flags on lamp posts and poles, and additional spectators are seated in stands in the background.

attrs.description: The image depicts a heavily forested hill containing a secured installation. In the center is a loop road network with several cleared pads containing rectangular shelters or small buildings. To the northeast, a larger support compound is visible, consisting of multiple administrative and utility buildings, barracks, and cleared plots connected by service roads. Another built-up area with agricultural fields and residential/support structures is situated to the southwest. Several small, irregular ponds and water reservoirs are visible in the surrounding terrain, and a multi-lane highway runs along the far left edge of the frame.

observed_features.note: A teardrop or circular road network containing several pads.
Small rectangular structures located within the loop road cleared areas.
Numerous buildings making up the support compound to the northeast.
Small ponds or reservoirs around the base of the hill.

attrs.site_signature_geometry: The image depicts a heavily forested hill containing a secured installation. Another built-up area with agricultural fields and residential/support structures is situated to the southwest. Several small, irregular ponds and water reservoirs are visible in the surrounding terrain, and a multi-lane highway runs along the far left edge of the frame.

attrs.description: This overhead frame captures a large wedge-shaped or pentagonal central compound embedded within a densely developed urban grid. The most prominent feature inside this compound is a highly symmetrical, circular paved road or track network featuring multiple internal loops arranged in a pattern resembling a cloverleaf or stylized wheel. Directly south of this circular track are several large rectangular buildings, courtyards, and potential vehicle parks. To the west of the compound, an athletic field with a reddish oval running track is visible. The surrounding areas to the east, west, north, and south consist of uniform, grid-aligned high-rise residential buildings, commercial structures, and multi-lane roadways with standard intersections.

observed_features.note: Symmetrical circular layout with internal clover-like loops and paths
Wedge-shaped property bounded by roads containing the circular track and buildings
High-density urban blocks surrounding the central compound
Sports field with a red running track layout

attrs.description: An overhead view of a military or utility facility situated in hilly, partially forested terrain. The central feature is a large, light-colored cleared pad with several parking areas. A prominent row of approximately 10 to 12 rectangular vehicles or trailers is parked in a neat line in the southeastern portion of this pad, with other small clusters of vehicles dispersed nearby. To the south and southwest of this central area, a cluster of rectangular buildings and support structures is nestled among the trees. A network of winding dirt roads connects the different sectors of the site across the rugged, vegetated landscape.

observed_features.note: A distinct row of rectangular vehicles or trailers parked side-by-side in the southeastern portion of the central pad.
A large, central cleared area on high ground hosting several vehicle parking and staging zones.
Rectangular support or barracks buildings located to the southwest of the central pad.
Winding, unpaved dirt tracks and roads traversing the hilly terrain.
